parameters.query: =SELECT (SELECT id::text FROM n8n_users WHERE token='{{ $json.token }}' AND token_expires > NOW() LIMIT 1) AS uid;
=SELECT id::text AS id, content, source, evidence_type, 1 - (embedding <=> '{{ $json.vector }}'::vector) AS score FROM documents ORDER BY embedding <=> '{{ $json.vector }}'::vector LIMIT 5;

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({model:'llama-3.1-8b-instant',temperature:0.2,response_format:{type:'json_object'},messages:[{role:'system',content:"You are a senior clinical reviewer critiquing a differential diagnosis.
Return ONLY JSON: {"diagnoses":[{"condition":"...","confidence":"low|medium|high","evidence_ids":["..."],"reasoning":"..."}],"reasoning":"...","needs_reretrival":false,"missing_evidence_hint":null}
Job: critique each initial diagnosis, elevate under-weighted, demote over-weighted, set needs_reretrival=true if evidence missing. evidence_ids must come from provided docs."},{role:'user',content: $json.user_prompt_initial + '

INITIAL DIAGNOSIS:
' + ($json.initial.diagnoses||[]).map(d=>'- '+d.condition+' ['+d.confidence+']: '+d.reasoning).join('
') + '

INITIAL REASONING:
' + ($json.initial.reasoning||'') + '

Critique and revise.'}]}) }}
